hero.title: QA Engineer
hero.subtitle: QA Engineer specialized in functional testing, automation, APIs, and continuous software quality improvement.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Ensuring excellence and robustness in every line of code.
about.p1: Hello, I'm Odabel Santos Álvarez. As a QA Engineer, my primary focus is not just finding bugs, but preventing them and establishing processes that guarantee fast, secure, and high-quality software releases.
about.p2: I specialize in designing and executing testing strategies ranging from thorough manual validations and functional regression tests, to automating critical user workflows (BDD using Selenium + Cucumber) and robust API validation (Postman).
about.p3: My core value lies in bridging technical development and business requirements, ensuring that the final product not only functions technically but also offers a seamless and reliable experience for the end user. I operate under Agile methodologies (Scrum), actively collaborating with developers and product owners.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my hands-on work, automation frameworks, and testing tools

ecommerce_bdd.title: BDD Automation Framework for E-Commerce
ecommerce_bdd.description: Scaffolded and implemented a robust test automation framework from scratch using BDD (Behavior Driven Development) methodology with Selenium WebDriver, Java, and Cucumber. Automated complex workflows like shopping cart, login, and checkout, generating rich HTML Cucumber Reports.

api_postman.title: REST API Validation Suite with Postman
api_postman.description: Created advanced Postman collections for functional validation of 50+ endpoints. Includes automated assertions using JS scripts (JSON Schema validation, status codes, response times, and chained requests). Integrated with Newman for command-line execution.

mobile_banking.title: Quality Assurance for Mobile Banking App
mobile_banking.description: Conducted regression, usability, security, and compatibility testing on emulators and real mobile devices (Android/iOS). Developed and maintained basic mobile test automation scripts using Appium and Java. Documented test suites in Zephyr for Jira.

saas_testing.title: Comprehensive System Testing for B2B SaaS Platform
saas_testing.description: Planned and executed end-to-end (E2E) manual testing, including Smoke, Sanity, and Integration testing. Conducted direct data validation via SQL Server queries. Managed full bug lifecycles in Jira using Xray, actively collaborating in daily Agile sprints.

testdata_generator.title: QA Test Data Generator Tool
testdata_generator.description: Personal project to streamline testing tasks. Static web application that generates structured test data (valid ID numbers, emails, names, lorem-ipsum paragraphs, and JSON payloads ready for API testing). Persists configuration preferences locally.

playwright_suite.title: E2E & Visual Regression Testing Suite
playwright_suite.description: Designed and implemented a testing architecture using Playwright and TypeScript with the Page Object Model (POM) pattern. Features E2E functional verification with network mocking (Formspree API bypass) and Visual Regression Testing (VRT) across desktop and mobile viewports.

highlights.title: QA Impact & Accomplishments
highlights.subtitle: Quantitative metrics showcasing my impact on product quality and process efficiency
highlights.impact_1_desc: Reduced manual regression test cycles from 3 days to a fully automated Selenium+Java build pipeline running in 40 minutes.
highlights.impact_2_desc: Configured automated API tests in CI/CD pipeline, catching 95% of integration issues before staging deployment.
highlights.impact_3_desc: Completely structured test suites in Jira/Xray, obtaining 100% requirement coverage traceability for user stories.
